description: A faithful pink mechanical cat-car Codex pet with a huge round head, sausage-shaped body, tiny wheel feet, metallic whiskers, and a clever slightly fierce face.

idle.notes: Alert low-motion idle with tiny blink, slight body bob, and subtle tail sway.

walk.notes: Directional wheel-walk used for movement and drag-facing behavior.

curious.notes: Subtle observant lean with brighter eyes, eyebrow shift, and whisker reaction.

happy.notes: Restrained pleased bounce with brighter expression and livelier tail.

sleep.notes: Gentle low-power rest with closed eyes, still wheels, and relaxed tail.

roll_glide.notes: Optional in-place rolling or gliding loop that preserves the cat-car silhouette.

tiny_hop.notes: Small toy-like buoyant hop without realistic cat jumping stretch.

deep_rest.notes: Heavier tucked low-power rest state stored in the spare row.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses the true-facing walk rows rather than a guessed mirror mapping.

roll_glide.notes: Optional spare atlas row used for an in-place rolling or gliding loop.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses a true left-facing strip
right drag uses a true right-facing strip
walk_left and walk_right are not swapped
head, body, wheel stance, and tail stay directionally unified in both walk rows
left drag never faces right and right drag never faces left
